targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r.severity == "CRITICAL" and r._field == "message")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r.severity == "WARNING" and r._field == "message")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "son_actions" and r._field == "message")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "son_actions" and r.action_type == "LOAD_BALANCE" and r._field == "message")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "son_actions" and r.action_type == "DTX_RECOMMEND" and r._field == "message")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "son_actions" and r.action_type == "PCI_REOPT_REQUEST" and r._field == "message")
  |> count()

panels.title: Alert Rate Over Time by Type

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r._field == "message")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["alert_type"])
  |> yield(name: "alerts_by_type")

panels.title: SON Actions Over Time by Action Type

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "son_actions" and r._field == "message")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["action_type"])
  |> yield(name: "son_actions")

panels.title: Alert Metric Values — SINR (dB) and PRB (%)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r._field == "metric_value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["alert_type"])
  |> yield(name: "metric")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "alerts" and r._field == "ai_confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value >= 0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "ai_conf")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "son_actions" and r._field == "message")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)
